news.t: Modernize Fixed Income Portfolios With Income Alternatives
Money is flooding into these ETFs, despite heavy software exposure and worries about private credit

overview.description: The Janus Henderson AAA CLO ETF (JAAA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to provide current income by actively selecting investment-grade floating rate collateralized loan obligations (CLO) securities of various maturities from issuers around the globe. JAAA was launched on Oct 16, 2020 and is issued by Janus Henderson.
